# Cutctx

> Local-first context control plane for AI agents and LLM applications. Govern what reaches the model, attribute spend and savings, remember shared context, and compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks when it helps. Library, proxy, and MCP server. Open-core (Apache-2.0 client + proprietary commercial core).

Cutctx is shipped as a Python package (`cutctx-ai`), a TypeScript package (`cutctx-ai`), an OpenAI + Anthropic-compatible HTTP proxy (`cutctx proxy`), and an MCP server (`cutctx_compress`, `cutctx_retrieve`, `cutctx_stats` tools). All four modes use the same compression pipeline: per-content-type compressors (JSON, code, logs, diffs, text) feed into a Compress-Cache-Retrieve (CCR) store so compression stays reversible — the LLM can ask for the original whenever it wants.

The canonical, always-current documentation index lives at the docs site below. If you can fetch one URL, fetch that one; the entries here are a hand-curated subset.

## Canonical docs (start here)

- [Live llms.txt (full doc index)](llms.txt): Auto-generated index of every doc page with descriptions.
- [Live llms-full.txt (every doc page concatenated)](llms.txt): One Markdown blob containing every doc page. Use when you can spend the tokens for full context.
- [Docs site](docs/content/docs/index.mdx): Human-browsable docs with search.
- [GitHub repo](https://github.com/cutctx/cutctx): Source, issues, releases.
- [PyPI package](https://pypi.org/project/cutctx-ai/): Python install.
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/cutctx-ai): TypeScript install.

## Install (copy-paste-runnable)

- Python: `pip install cutctx-ai` (add `[all]` for every optional extra)
- TypeScript / Node: `npm install cutctx-ai` (or `pnpm add cutctx-ai`, `bun add cutctx-ai`)
- Docker: `docker run -p 8787:8787 ghcr.io/cutctx/cutctx:latest`
- Run the proxy: `cutctx proxy --port 8787` then point any client at `http://127.0.0.1:8787`
- Wrap an agent in one command: `cutctx wrap claude` (also: `codex`, `cursor`, `aider`, `copilot`, `gemini`)

## Entry points

- [Quickstart](docs/content/docs/quickstart.mdx): 5-minute end-to-end (install → compress → call the model).
- [Installation](docs/content/docs/installation.mdx): All install paths, extras, Docker tags, env vars.
- [Proxy server](docs/content/docs/proxy.mdx): Run as a local HTTP proxy in front of OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini.
- [MCP server](docs/content/docs/mcp.mdx): `cutctx_compress`, `cutctx_retrieve`, `cutctx_stats` for Claude Code / Cursor / any MCP host.
- [API reference](docs/content/docs/api-reference.mdx): Python + TypeScript `compress()` API.

## How it works

- [How compression works](docs/content/docs/how-compression-works.mdx): Three-stage pipeline + automatic content routing.
- [SmartCrusher](docs/content/docs/smart-crusher.mdx): Statistical JSON / array compression (70–90% on tool outputs).
- [Code compression](docs/content/docs/code-compression.mdx): AST-aware via tree-sitter (preserves imports, signatures, types).
- [Text & log compression](docs/content/docs/text-and-logs.mdx): Search results, build logs, diffs.
- [CCR (reversible)](docs/content/docs/ccr.mdx): Compress-Cache-Retrieve — originals never deleted; LLM retrieves on demand.

## SDK / framework integrations

- [Anthropic SDK](docs/content/docs/anthropic-sdk.mdx): `withCutctx(anthropic)` wrapper.
- [OpenAI SDK](docs/content/docs/openai-sdk.mdx): `withCutctx(openai)` wrapper.
- [Vercel AI SDK](docs/content/docs/vercel-ai-sdk.mdx): Middleware + `withCutctx()`.
- [LangChain](docs/content/docs/langchain.mdx): Chat models, memory, retrievers, agents.
- [Agno](docs/content/docs/agno.mdx): Model wrapping + observability hooks.
- [Strands](docs/content/docs/strands.mdx): Model wrapping + hook-based tool output compression.
- [LiteLLM](docs/content/docs/litellm.mdx): Single callback; works with all 100+ LiteLLM providers.

## Memory & cross-agent state

- [Persistent memory](docs/content/docs/memory.mdx): Per-project SQLite + HNSW vector store. No cross-project bleed (GH #462).
- [SharedContext](docs/content/docs/shared-context.mdx): Compressed inter-agent context handoffs.
- [Failure learning](docs/content/docs/failure-learning.mdx): Offline analysis writes corrections to `CLAUDE.md` / `AGENTS.md`.

## Operations

- [Configuration](docs/content/docs/configuration.mdx): Env vars, config file, per-call overrides.
- [Benchmarks](docs/content/docs/benchmarks.mdx): Token-savings numbers across content types.
- [Troubleshooting](docs/content/docs/troubleshooting.mdx): Common failure modes and fixes.
- [Limitations](docs/content/docs/limitations.mdx): What Cutctx won't do well today.

## Licensing

Open-core licensing. The client (library, proxy, CLI, MCP server, SDKs, base model) is Apache 2.0 — use commercially, modify, redistribute. The commercial core (control plane, enterprise admin, agent-tuned models) is proprietary; see LICENSING.md. Data stays on the user's machine when running the library, proxy, or MCP server locally. Anonymous telemetry enabled by default; set `CUTCTX_TELEMETRY=off` to disable.
